zh.Erfenbach, Kaiserslautern, Pfalz, Bayern: 德國貝也藍德可萊斯 凱澤斯勞特艾分巴賀
zh.Heinsberg, Kreis Heinsberg, Nordrhein-We: 德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格海斯格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie von Nörvenich於大約1145年出生時，她的父親Lodewijk I VAN LOON37歲，母親Agnes de Metz32歲。她和Gottfried von Heinsberg至少有1個女兒。她去世於1185年享年41歲。

zh-hans.Erfenbach, Kaiserslautern, Pfalz, Bayern: 德国貝也藍德可萊斯 凱澤斯勞特艾分巴賀
zh-hans.Heinsberg, Kreis Heinsberg, Nordrhein-We: 德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫海斯格海斯格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophie von Nörvenich于大约1145年出生时，她的父亲Lodewijk I VAN LOON37岁，母亲Agnes de Metz32岁。她和Gottfried von Heinsberg至少有1个女儿。她去世于1185年享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Sophie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

variants.name: Sophy
meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie von Nörvenich was born about 1145, her father, Lodewijk I VAN LOON, was 37 and her mother, Agnes de Metz, was 32. She had at least 1 daughter with Gottfried von Heinsberg. She died in 1185, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie von Nörvenich est née environ 1145, son père, Lodewijk I VAN LOON, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Agnes de Metz, avait 32 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Gottfried von Heinsberg. Elle est décédée en 1185, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie von Nörvenich um 1145 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Lodewijk I VAN LOON 37 und ihre Mutter Agnes de Metz 32. Sie hatte mit Gottfried von Heinsberg mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1185 im Alter von 41 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Nörvenich è nata il circa 1145, sua padre, Lodewijk I VAN LOON, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Agnes de Metz, aveva 32 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Gottfried von Heinsberg. Morì nel 1185, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.Erfenbach, Kaiserslautern, Pfalz, Bayern: ドイツバイエルンランドクレイス ケイセルスラウテルンエルフエンバチ
ja.Mechelen, Malines, Antwerpen, Vlaanderen: ベルギーアントウエルペンメチェレン
ja.Heinsberg, Kreis Heinsberg, Nordrhein-We: ドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンヘインスバーグヘインスバーグ
ja.Borgloon, Borgloon, Limburg, Belgium: ベルギーリンブルグボルグロオン
ja.lifeSummary: Sophie von Nörvenichが約1145年に生まれた時，父Lodewijk I VAN LOONは37歳，母Agnes de Metzは32歳であった。彼女はGottfried von Heinsbergとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1185年に41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sophie von Nörvenich(이)가 대략 1145년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Lodewijk I VAN LOON(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de Metz(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 Gottfried von Heinsberg(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1185년 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Nörvenich nasceu aproximadamente 1145, seu pai, Lodewijk I VAN LOON, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Agnes de Metz, tinha 32 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Gottfried von Heinsberg. Ela faleceu em 1185, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie von Nörvenich родилась около 1145 г., её отцу по имени Lodewijk I VAN LOON было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes de Metz, 32. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Gottfried von Heinsberg. Она умерла в 1185 г. в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sophie von Nörvenich nació aproximadamente 1145, su papá, Lodewijk I VAN LOON, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Agnes de Metz, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Gottfried von Heinsberg. Murió en 1185, a la edad de 41 años.

th.Mechelen, Malines, Antwerpen, Vlaanderen: เมชเอลเอน, แอนตเวรเพน, เบลเยียม
th.Heinsberg, Kreis Heinsberg, Nordrhein-We: ไฮนสเบรก, ไฮนสเบรก, เนอรดรไฮน-เวสตฟาลเอน, ประเทศเยอรมัน
th.Borgloon, Borgloon, Limburg, Belgium: โบรโกลอน, ลีมบอูรก, เบลเยียม
